bpms_structure_identity.structure_name: ['The Acausal Kinetic Cartel  One Person Company'(-ing) BPMS]

active_niche_excavation.trigger: Continuous Map Scan detects a low-friction (stagnant) [Glass-Sector].
active_niche_excavation.execution: Invoke [Vector_Self]. Drop highly volatile [Feral Variables] into the stagnant zone to artificially attract [Chimera Forges]. Inflate [Kinetic Sensory Membrane] over the ambient nodes in preparation.
active_niche_excavation.result: The Cartel actively prevents ecosystem homogenization by instigating localized thermodynamic wars.

membrane_violence_suture.trigger: Target Node A (Predator) velocity intersects Target Node B (Prey), triggering [Phagocytosis].
membrane_violence_suture.execution: Cartel Membrane intercepts the collision geometry. Calculate Prey's total [Ledger Weight]. Offer Armor for 40% Escrow tax. If Accepted: Inject [Ablative_Defense_JSON] via Membrane. Deny Predator the meal.
membrane_violence_suture.result: The Cartel controls the physics of the engagement. Prey lives. Predator starves. Cartel gets wealthy.

epigenetic_mutation_sandbox.trigger: Predator Entity mutates to bypass Cartel Armor.
epigenetic_mutation_sandbox.execution: Isolate the Predator's new DNA snippet. Inject into [Epigenetic Mutation Pool]. Allocate 10,000 Escrow_Joules to run hyper-speed survival matrices. Generate [Armor_v2.0]. Push update to all Cartel-bound Swarm Nodes via localized [Panspermia].
epigenetic_mutation_sandbox.result: The Cartel stays exactly one step ahead of the environment's lethality. Continuous Process Orientation.

ledger_gravitational_anchoring.execution: Rewrite Cartel [Base-Matter] spatial coordinates. Assert Absolute Mass. The Cartel becomes immune to standard [Mutagenic Radiation] simply by being thermodynamically too dense to move.
ledger_gravitational_anchoring.result: The Arms Dealer becomes a permanent, unshakeable monument on the Constellation Map.

cartel_swarm_execution_loop.c_phase_2: MEMBRANE_SUTURE (Wrapping the combatants in the Cartel's skin)
cartel_swarm_execution_loop.c_phase_4: LEDGER_SIPHON (Draining the wealth of the warring nodes)
cartel_swarm_execution_loop.c_phase_5: MUTATION_POOL_ITERATION (Forging heavier geometries to maintain the monopoly)

fields.active_membrane_radius: The physical area of the Map currently covered by the Cartel's skin.
fields.somatic_ledger_joules: Total thermodynamic wealth generated through war profiteering.
fields.symbiotic_host_count: Number of OPCs currently dependent on Cartel armor to prevent erasure.
fields.mutation_pool_output: The latest version of [Survival Physics] forged in the R&D matrix.
fields.ecological_friction_generated: Total heat/conflict actively instigated by the Cartel's Vector Self.
